scenes.narration: Moo moo! Look at the dancing cow! She loves to dance all day long! Can you dance like a cow?
Waddle waddle! The penguin is dancing on the ice! He slides and spins so fast! Let's dance like a penguin!
Hop hop! The bunny is dancing in the garden! She shakes her maraca and hops really high! Can you hop like a bunny?
Roar! The lion is dancing with his cool sunglasses! He's the king of the dance floor! Let's roar and dance!
All the animals are dancing together! Cow, penguin, bunny, and lion! Everybody dance and have fun! Yay!
